info.brief: Prefixless global symbols available to every Defold script.
info.description: Hand-vendored catalog of the ambient symbols Defold scripts reach with no namespace prefix (declared in src/engine-globals.d.ts). Upstream has no machine-readable export for this surface; refresh by reading the Defold API reference and editing this file. Documents callable/global-value symbols only; the ambient engine types are out of scope.

elements.name: hash
elements.brief: hash a string into a hash value
elements.description: Hashes a string into a hash value. The hash can be used to reference resources and identifiers in the Defold engine without carrying the original string around.
